features: 【Nude ColorShort Press On Nails】: Our short press on nail French tip looks more adorable and the nude color is more comfortable for you to DIY nail charms. fake nails short are soft and flexible, no more pressure on the nail beds and feel like real tips.

【French False Nails Kit】: Our package comes with 240 pieces of fake nails in a storage box with a nail file and nail glue. Each grid packs 16 pieces of press on nails in 15 different sizes, enough quantity for your daily replacement and nail art DIY

【High Quality】: Our short French tip ballerina false nails are made of premium ABS +Acrylic material, a glossy surface, malleable, natural and pre-shaped. Comfortable and No Stinging! Selected the most suitable radian and thickness for women, more comfortable to wear

【15 SIZES FIT YOUR NAILS】These short square nails comes in 15 different sizes of each size, which makes it a total of 240 pieces. With the professional nail sizes database, make it easier to find one that suits you
【LONG LASTING】The press on nails can last more than 3 weeks. No crease nail tips, you just apply nail glue and press it onto your nails to create your dream nails shape.Meet all your differ needs
description: Product description Features 1.Natural french nail Elegant match 2.Simple and generous toshow noble temperamentbe the most confident self 3.Comfortable, flewibie, durabie can betimmed to any shape orlength withoutdeformation or creasing. 4.DIY Nail Art Decorations: You can use other accessories to adhere to the fake nails to create your favorite style. How to Use: 1. Gently rub the nail slices with a nail stick to remove the surface cuticles, rinse off and keep the nails clean and dry. 2. Choose the size that best suits your nails, taking an appropriate amount of glue or free jelly glue on the inside of the selected nail plate. 3. Press the false nails on your own nails and hold them for 30 seconds. 4. Trim according to the shape and length of the press on the nail you want. Notice: If you want to remove it, just soak your nails in warm water and gently peel off the pre-glued nails from the side after a few minutes. Remove the glue sticker and keep the fake nail tip for the next time use. Package List: 240 x Glossy Ballerina Coffin Press on Nail French Tips 1 x Nail File Sticks 1 x Nail Glue 1 x Nail Pusher Material: ABS +Acrylic Color: Nude Pink Directions Gently rub the nail slices with a nail stick to remove the surface cuticles, rinse off and keep the nails clean and dry. Choose the size that best suits your nails, taking an appropriate amount of glue or free jelly glue on the inside of the selected nail plate. Press the false nails on your own nails and hold them for 30 seconds. Trim according to the shape and length of the press on the nail you want. Safety Warning NAIL USE See more
